title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.171 - Links, Incorporated Day, November 9
text:
9.171.  Links, Incorporated Day, November 9. — November ninth each year is hereby designated as "Links, Incorporated Day" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to recognize this international, not-for-profit corporation for its service work and contributions to communities across this state.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
